title: Ashen + Wilder Wild
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen and Wilder Wild
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) with [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)? Tired of certain blocks using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack above [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) in your load order.

This pack is designed and intended for use with Ashen 16x and Wilder Wild mod.

Credits:

Aim_Boot - [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack

FrozenBlock - [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) mod
